questions.question: What are the core features of the HostBridge Plus product?
questions.justification: The synthesis text lists the core feature list of HostBridge Plus, including device connection, extension mode, remote mode, KM share mode, and cross-device file transfer.

questions.question: What are the business goals and success metrics for the HostBridge Plus product?
questions.justification: The synthesis text states that the business goal is to develop a cross-OS collaboration reference design (HostBridge Plus) to provide a customizable solution for OEM customers, and the success metric is to get 3 Tier-1 OEM customers to adopt the HostBridge Plus solution within 12 months.

questions.question: What are the key user personas and scenarios for the HostBridge Plus product?
questions.justification: The synthesis text describes two key user personas (a Tier-1 OEM product manager and a full-stack software engineer) and two user scenarios (seamless cross-platform development and debugging, and fluid cross-platform design and high-fidelity preview).
